mapper.select: SELECT id, country, country_name AS countryName, category, import_tax_rate AS importTaxRate, vat_rate AS vatRate, consumption_tax_rate AS consumptionTaxRate, effective_tax_rate AS effectiveTaxRate, hs_code AS hsCode, description, policy_changes AS policyChanges, tax_tips AS taxTips FROM tax_rates ORDER BY country, category

SELECT id, country, country_name AS countryName, category, import_tax_rate AS importTaxRate, vat_rate AS vatRate, consumption_tax_rate AS consumptionTaxRate, effective_tax_rate AS effectiveTaxRate, hs_code AS hsCode, description FROM tax_rates WHERE country = #{country} ORDER BY category
SELECT id, from_currency AS fromCurrency, to_currency AS toCurrency, rate, update_time AS updateTime FROM exchange_rates WHERE from_currency = #{fromCurrency} AND to_currency = #{toCurrency} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, from_currency AS fromCurrency, to_currency AS toCurrency, rate, update_time AS updateTime FROM exchange_rates ORDER BY from_currency, to_currency
